issues.plain_language_description: This element has an unlabeled button with no accessible name — Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers.
issues.recommended_fix: • (WCAG 4.1.2) Add a visible <label>, aria-label, or aria-labelledby so assistive technologies can read its name.
evidence: Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers

issues.plain_language_description: This element has a missing image alt attribute — Element does not have an alt attribute.
issues.recommended_fix: • (WCAG 1.1.1) Add a meaningful alt attribute describing the content or purpose of the element.
evidence: Element does not have an alt attribute

issues.plain_language_description: This element has headings that skip levels (e.g. h1 → h3 with no h2) — Heading order invalid.
issues.recommended_fix: • (WCAG 1.3.1) Use semantic html elements and aria roles so structure is conveyed programmatically.
